data.body: Resolved in PR #93 (commit d755bfe4e). scripts/probe-rebar.sh: line ~146 edit now uses --set-tags=probe,edited (was removed --tags); priority assertion passes as a result; the show/list keyset assertion replaced with subset + exact-extra ([comments,description]) checks. Verified against current engine in an isolated store: 142 passed, 0 failed (was 138 passed, 3 failed).
